concerns.text: T011 attempts to fetch AdaPlanBench from 'numenta/NAB' (a time-series anomaly dataset) or a non-existent HF ID. Spec FR-001 and US-1 require the specific 'AdaPlanBench' household dataset with progressive constraints. This task cannot satisfy the FR.

Tasks T032-T036 implement 'Reconfiguration Cost' and 'heuristic state switching' to address a reviewer comment. However, Spec FR-001 through FR-011 and SC-001 through SC-005 contain no requirement or success criterion for measuring 'learning vs. static rule selection' or 'reconfiguration cost'. These tasks are untraceable scope creep.

T010 tests 'URL reachability'. Spec US-1 and FR-001 require filtering the dataset and verifying the 'constraint_count' field. While URL reachability is a prerequisite, the spec defines the functional requirement as data content validation, not infrastructure ping. T010 does not map to the functional FR/SC.

T011 description lists 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/numenta/NAB/master/data/realKnownCause/...' which is a dead link for this project's dataset. The task description must be corrected to reference the correct canonical source for AdaPlanBench to be actionable.
